diagrams.title: Waterfall Model Flow
diagrams.description: Sequential phases of Waterfall model showing linear progression from requirements to maintenance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential development and its limitations for UI/UX

diagrams.title: Agile Sprint Cycle
diagrams.description: Iterative cycle showing sprint planning, development, testing, review, and continuous feedback
diagrams.purpose: Understanding iterative development benefits for UI/UX improvement

diagrams.title: Design Thinking Process
diagrams.description: Five-phase non-linear process from empathy to testing
diagrams.purpose: Human-centered problem solving approach for UI/UX

diagrams.title: Double Diamond Framework
diagrams.description: Four-quadrant design process showing problem discovery to solution delivery
diagrams.purpose: Balancing exploration and focus in design projects

diagrams.title: MVC Architecture
diagrams.description: Model-View-Controller pattern showing separation of data, UI, and logic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding software architecture for UI implementation

diagrams.title: UI vs UX Distinction
diagrams.description: Comparison showing UI visual elements vs UX overall experience
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the difference between interface and experience design
